news.title: Will The Stock Split Spark CrowdStrike’s Next Big Run?
news.summary: Cybersecurity provider CrowdStrike (CRWD) authorized its first-ever stock split at a 4-for-1 ratio, scheduled for distribution after the market close on July 1. A single share, trading near $680, drops to approximately $170 after the split. The split follows a sustained operational recovery from the global IT outage of July 2024. news.title: Seoul leads rout for tech shares as oil prices dip
news.summary: Seoul's stock market led a collapse for technology stocks Tuesday after a sell-off on Wall Street over renewed concern over companies' huge AI spending.The rout followed heavy selling Monday on Wall Street, where the Nasdaq sank more than one percent as market giants Amazon, Nvidia and Microsoft fell sharply.

news.title: Tesla Bounces Back in Europe
